updates.title: Status page launched
updates.body: First version of the Nenni & Associates status page is live. Every update to the Building Efficiency Podcast site — new episodes, audio re-edits, page changes, brand updates — will be logged here going forward.

updates.title: Ep 144 (Charlie Zitnik) — retitled and re-edited
updates.body: Episode title finalized as "Why Energy Projects Stall — and How to Fix It." Audio replaced with the Descript magic-edit clean pass (32:36 → 31:37); chapter timestamps re-anchored to the cleaned edit, and show notes timestamps updated to match. Vertical thumbnail regenerated with the new headline. Steve Goehl's name corrected throughout (transcripts had it as "Gale").
